actionCalls.description: Updates ownership of newly created Experience Curriculum opportunity using round robin
actionCalls.name: Assign_EC_Owner
actionCalls.label: Assign EC Owner

decisions.description: Evaluates the appropriate public group for round-robin assignment of the Onboarding Coordinator and Combined Funnel owner user.
decisions.name: Assignments_Evaluation_ExistingCombinedFunnel
decisions.label: Assignments Evaluation

decisions.description: Decides on the next steps based on whether a Combined Funnel was found or not.
decisions.name: Combined_Funnel_Exists
decisions.label: Combined Funnel Exists?

decisions.description: Identifies 'Customer Type' based on the 'Number of Sites' field on the opportunity.
decisions.name: Customer_Type_Assessment
decisions.label: Customer Type Assessment

decisions.description: Since contacts for SaaS and Billing Primary Contact are different, check if there's any contact tagged as Billing Primary Contact. If there is, update that contact's field "Onboarding Billing Primary Contact" to true only.
decisions.name: Existing_Different_Billing_Contact
decisions.label: Existing Different Billing Contact?

decisions.description: Checks the value on the field "Interested In BW Learning" on the CW opportunity is "Yes".
decisions.name: Interested_In_BW_Learning
decisions.label: Interested In BW Learning?

decisions.description: Checks if the contact assgined as the SaaS Primary Contact and Billing Primary Contact on the opportunity is the same
decisions.name: Same_SaaS_And_Billing_Primary_Contact
decisions.label: Same SaaS And Billing Primary Contact?

Flow.description: When a SaaS opportunity moves to the 'Closed Won' stage, this flow creates the Combined Funnel and Onboarding records for the account. Additionally, it creates child records for multi-site accounts. 01/29/24 - PE - Added the "Raise Montana Conversion" path. 02/28/24 - PE - Mapped opportunity promo code to account and child accounts. 03/28/24 - PE - Added path to call a subflow to make assignments on the account 06/20/24 - PE - Updated value for Billing Onboarding Status on CF and Billing Onboarding. 6/25/24 - JH - removed raise montana decision at start of flow. Set the open and operating date last updated when the combined funnel is created. 6/26/24 - BW - added logic to populate account Billing Activation Start Date 07/16/24 - PE - Removed references to field Subisidy Tracking, Declined Billing Training and Declined Billing Training Reason 07/19/24 - PE - Added subflow to sync onboarding with school after main billing and saas onboarding records are created. 07/29/24 - PE - Mapped Billing Activation Start Date to populate on child accounts. 08/12/24 - PE - Mapped OBC Owner, OBC Call Scheduled Date and OBC Call Completed Date to accounts. 09/11/24 - PE - Added element to stamp created combined funnel to CW opportunity. 09/24/24 - BW - Added existing record check before creating EC Opp based off of Interesting in BW Learning 10/7/24 - JH Updated formula "forT_Account_IsBrandNewProgram" to also be set to yes when BNP Site Add is selected 12/17/24 - MC - added decision element: Onboarding Path - if standard - it will call the subflow to assign the custom sequence reminders for the opportunity owner 12/17/24 - MC - updated forT_CombinedFunnel_Owner to assign to 00GEi000006ASkLMAW (Standard Path Onboarding Queue), added this value to the forT_Account_UpdateAccountOwner formula 12/27/24 - JH updated (update account) nodes to set the value of 'Bill Rate Submitted Date' to Opp CW Date when 'Was Rate Card Added' = Yes (via flow formula variable) 01/06/2024 - LK - Changed the forT_Account_Owner formula to add logic for Standard Onboarding Path. During CW for Saas Oppty, the OBS owner data will not be available - so the Account should stay in the AE's name instead of defaulting to Account Queue when OBS Owner field on Oppty is Blank. 01/08/25 - LK - Updated forT_CombinedFunnel_owner formula so it only sets the Combined Funnel Owner as Standard Onboarding Queue, if the OBS Owner is blank at opp saas cw. 1/28/2025 - Deleted - decision element: Onboarding Path - if standard - it will call the subflow to assign the custom sequence reminders for the opportunity owner 2/10/25 - BW -Updated Account Updates to include Most Recent SaaS CW Opportunity 02/25/25 - PE - Added node to call OA creation subflow 3/13/25 JH - updated to remove child site record creation in async path, this will be done in subflow called from cw screen flow instead 03/19/25 - Add a subflow to Sync Opportunity Post CW stages. 03/21/25 - Removed Add a subflow to Sync Opportunity Post CW stages. 04/25/25 - Added logic to populate Number of Schools on Account from CW Opp. Adjusted formula for new Rate Card picklist values 5/12/2025 - JS Moved several nodes to async path in order to free up CPU resources 5/19/2025 - AC - Removed references to Account Status field 2/5/2026 - DM - Removed references to OBC Owner field (deprecating field) 3/12/2026 - AC - Exempting Site Adds from CF and Account Update nodes.

formulas.description: Sets the Bill Rate Submitted Date on account to the date the saas opp was updated to CW if 'Was Rate Card Added' = Yes, otherwise leave blank
formulas.name: ForD_Bill_Rate_Submitted_Date
forT_Account_IsBrandNewProgram
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c}, 'BNP Site-Add'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c}, 'Brand New Program')), 'Yes', 'No' )

formulas.name: forT_CombinedFunnel_Owner
formulas.expression: IF( OR( {!$Record.Declined_SaaS_Training__c} = True, {!$Record.Declined_Billing_Training__c}= True ), '00G3u000002aqp3EAA', IF( AND( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c},'Standard'), ISBLANK({!$Record.OBS_Owner__c}) ), '00GPB000001orzp2AA', IF( AND( ISBLANK({!$Record.OBS_Owner__c}), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c},'Self Serve')) ), '00G3u000002egpzEAA', IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Onboarding_Path__c},'Self Serve'), '00G3u000002aqp3EAA', {!$Record.OBS_Owner__c} )) ))

Flow.interviewLabel: Opportunity - SaaS CW - After Save - Create Combined Funnel and Onboarding Records {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Opportunity - SaaS CW - After Save - Create Combined Funnel and Onboarding Records

recordCreates.description: Create a new Experience Curriculum Upsell opportunity
recordCreates.name: Create_EC_Opportunity
recordCreates.label: Create EC Opportunity

recordCreates.description: Create a new Billing Onboarding record from the closed won opportunity.
recordCreates.name: Create_Main_Billing_Onboarding_Record
recordCreates.label: Create Main Billing Onboarding Record

recordCreates.name: Link_Billing_Handoff_Note_to_Combined_Funnel
recordCreates.label: Link Billing Handoff Note to Combined Funnel

recordCreates.name: Link_SaaS_Handoff_Note_to_Combined_Funnel
recordCreates.label: Link SaaS Handoff Note to Combined Funnel

recordLookups.description: Checks if there's any Combined Funnel record associated with the opportunity's account.
recordLookups.name: Check_for_Combined_Funnel
recordLookups.label: Check for Combined Funnel

recordLookups.description: Get the Owner of the Combined Funnel. This owner information might be set in one of two ways: either by the Apex Round Robin node on an existing Combined Funnel Record or from a newly created Combined Funnel record.
recordLookups.name: Copy_1_of_Get_Combined_Funnel_Owner
recordLookups.label: Get Combined Funnel Owner

recordLookups.description: Get the Owner of the Combined Funnel. This owner information might be set in one of two ways: either by the Apex Round Robin node on an existing Combined Funnel Record or from a newly created Combined Funnel record.
recordLookups.name: Get_Combined_Funnel
recordLookups.label: Get Combined Funnel

recordUpdates.description: If the contact for SaaS and Billing Primary Contact is the same, then set both fields "Onboarding Billing Primary Contact" and "Onboarding SaaS Primary Contact" to true.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Contact_As_SaaS_And_Billing_Primary
recordUpdates.label: Set Contact As SaaS And Billing Primary

recordUpdates.description: If the contacts for SaaS and Billing Primary Contact are different, then set the field "Onboarding SaaS Primary Contact" to true only.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Contact_As_SaaS_Primary
recordUpdates.label: Set Contact As SaaS Primary

recordUpdates.description: Now that the Combined funnel ownership has changed and Onboarding coordinator set, update these fields on the account to match those users.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Account_Owner
recordUpdates.label: Update Account Owner

recordUpdates.description: Updates the parent account associated with the opportunity's account.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Parent_Account
recordUpdates.label: Update Parent Account

variables.description: Variable created as a dummy to allow the creation of a loop element
variables.name: varR_Account
